nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Replace with Schedule Trigger (e.g. every 5 min) for production. Kept Manual for testing.

nodes.name: Read CleanersProfile
nodes.notes: Tab: CleanersProfile. Columns: property UID, cleaner ID, calendar ID, email, name, contact. Used by Assign Cleaner for lookup.

parameters.jsCode:
// Pass one item so Read Pending Cleaning Jobs runs once (CleanersProfile data is available via $('Read CleanersProfile').all() later).
return [$input.first()];

nodes.name: Single Item for Read Jobs
nodes.notes: Outputs one item so downstream Read Pending Cleaning Jobs runs once. CleanersProfile rows are read once and referenced in Assign Cleaner.

nodes.name: Read Pending Cleaning Jobs
nodes.notes: Same spreadsheet as Phase 1. Sheet: CleaningJobs. Reads all rows; Filter Pending Only filters by status=PENDING and empty cleanerId.

nodes.name: Filter Pending Only
nodes.notes: Ensures we only process PENDING + empty cleanerId. Skips if calendarEventId already set (no duplicate events).

nodes.name: Attach CleanersProfile
nodes.notes: Runs once before loop. Attaches CleanersProfile rows to each item so Assign Cleaner can read them inside the loop.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Process one cleaning job at a time to avoid overwrites and allow clear error scope.

nodes.name: Lookup Reservation
nodes.notes: Same spreadsheet as Phase 1. Sheet: Reservations. Enriches with propertyName, address if columns exist.

nodes.name: Ensure One Item (Job or Reservation)
nodes.notes: When Lookup returns no row, pass job only with propertyName/address fallbacks so Assign Cleaner still runs.

nodes.name: Merge Job and Reservation
nodes.notes: One item: cleaning job + reservation fields for propertyName, address, etc.

nodes.name: Assign Cleaner
nodes.notes: Lookup from CleanersProfile sheet by property UID. Needs columns: property UID, cleaner ID, calendar ID, email, name, contact.

nodes.name: Generate ClockIn Form Link
nodes.notes: Builds Google Form prefilled URL with bookingUid and cleanerId for the Cleaner Clock-In form.

nodes.name: Update Job Assigned
nodes.notes: Update by bookingUid. Sets cleanerId and assignedAt only. status=ASSIGNED is written later by Finalize Assignment after calendar creation.

nodes.name: Calculate Cleaning Time
nodes.notes: startTime = scheduledCleaningTimeUTC from original CleaningJobs row; endTime = startTime + 3h UTC. No 11:00, no legacy fields.

nodes.name: Already Has Calendar Event?
nodes.notes: TRUE = calendarEventId set → skip event creation (and notification). FALSE = create events + notify.

nodes.name: Create Admin Calendar Event
nodes.notes: Primary/admin calendar. Set calendarId in parameters (e.g. primary or shared admin calendar).

nodes.name: Create Cleaner Calendar Event
nodes.notes: Cleaner's calendar. Event ID from response is saved to sheet in next node. Description includes Clock-In Form link.

nodes.name: Prepare Event Id for Sheet
nodes.notes: Extracts event ID from Google Calendar create response. Cleaner calendar event ID is source of truth for link.

nodes.name: Update Job With Event Id
nodes.notes: Same spreadsheet as Phase 1. Sheet: CleaningJobs. Writes calendarEventId by bookingUid.

parameters.subject: =New Cleaning Assigned – {{ $('Assign Cleaner').item.json.propertyName || $('Assign Cleaner').item.json.propertyUid }}

nodes.name: Send Gmail to Cleaner
nodes.notes: Sends to cleaner email from mapping. Calendar link uses event ID (format may vary by API).

nodes.name: Skip (Already Has Event)
nodes.notes: When calendarEventId already set: no duplicate event, no duplicate email. Rejoin loop.

nodes.name: Lock Cleaning Job
nodes.notes: Row-level lock: set processingFlag=LOCKED so other runs do not pick this row. Runs before Assign Cleaner.

nodes.name: Finalize Assignment
nodes.notes: Atomic update after calendar creation and Gmail: sets status=ASSIGNED, calendarStatus=CREATED, clears processingFlag.
